import React from 'react'; import Card from '../components/Card'; const About = () => { const values = [ { icon: '🎯', title: 'Quality First', description: 'We never compromise on the quality of our service and parts used.' }, { icon: '⚡', title: 'Fast & Reliable', description: 'Quick turnaround times without sacrificing attention to detail.' }, { icon: '💡', title: 'Innovation', description: 'Using the latest tools and techniques for bike maintenance.' }, { icon: '🤝', title: 'Customer Focus', description: 'Your satisfaction is our top priority in everything we do.' } ]; const team = [ { name: 'John Smith', role: 'Founder & CEO', description: 'Passionate cyclist with 15+ years in bike maintenance industry.' }, { name: 'Maria Garcia', role: 'Head Technician', description: 'Expert mechanic specializing in high-end and electric bikes.' }, { name: 'David Wilson', role: 'Operations Manager', description: 'Ensures smooth operations and customer satisfaction.' } ]; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

About BikeCare

Revolutionizing bike maintenance with professional doorstep service

🔧🚴‍♂️
{/* Mission Section */}

Our Mission

At BikeCare, we believe that bike maintenance shouldn't be a hassle. Our mission is to provide professional, convenient, and reliable bike service right at your doorstep. We're passionate about keeping cyclists on the road with well-maintained, safe bikes.

{/* Vision Section */}

Our Vision

To become the leading bike service platform that makes bike maintenance accessible, convenient, and affordable for every cyclist. We envision a world where bike owners never have to worry about finding reliable service or transportation to bike shops.

{/* Values Section */}

Our Values

{values.map((value, index) => (
{value.icon}

{value.title}

{value.description}

 ))}
{/* Story Section */}

Our Story

BikeCare was founded in 2020 when our founder, John Smith, experienced the frustration of finding reliable bike service during the pandemic. As an avid cyclist, he realized that many bike owners faced similar challenges - long wait times at shops, transportation issues, and lack of transparency in pricing.

This led to the creation of BikeCare, a platform that brings professional bike technicians directly to customers' locations. What started as a small local service has now grown into a trusted platform serving thousands of satisfied customers.

Today, we're proud to offer comprehensive bike services including maintenance, repairs, price estimation, and resell value assessment - all with the convenience of doorstep service.

{/* Team Section */}

Meet Our Team

{team.map((member, index) => (
👤

{member.name}

{member.role}

{member.description}

 ))}
{/* Stats Section */}
5000+
Happy Customers
15000+
Services Completed
50+
Expert Technicians
25+
Cities Served
); }; export default About;
